pages.text: $(bold)Mending is removed.$() Instead, $(#7A2FBF)Unbreaking$() now has $(bold)5 levels$(), and $(#7A2FBF)Unbreaking V$() makes the tool $(italic)unbreakable$() - but you have to work your way there!

$(bold)Damage chance per level$()$(br)$(li)None: 100% $(li)I: 100% $(li)II: 75% $(li)III: 50% $(li)IV: 25% $(li)$(#7A2FBF)V: 0% (unbreakable)$()$(br2)Items that already have Mending keep it, but it no longer functions.

pages.title: Unbreakable
pages.text: A sword with Unbreaking V, marked as Unbreakable.
